narration: Fusion powers the Sun—so why can’t we capture it here?

narration: The secret? It’s all about creating the right conditions: extreme temperature and pressure.
visual_description: Context visual: The secret? It’s all about creating the right conditions: extreme temperature and pressure.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: The secret? It’s all about creating the right conditions: extreme temperature and pressure.

narration: Fusion needs over 150 million degrees Celsius—hotter than the core of the Sun! Can you imagine that?

narration: Recent experiments have achieved net energy gain—big milestones—but commercial fusion is still years away.
